summary: Static placeholder for resources whose public hosted state is deferred to platform readback.

readback.deeperFetch: Use public readback endpoints only after the platform exposes them.

boundaries.localValidation: Validates that the descriptor is static, bounded, and free of non-public values.
boundaries.runtime: This record does not claim hosted execution or live availability.
boundaries.publication: Hosted state is authoritative only when exposed by platform readback.
